violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The hand-washing sink in the meat area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Empanadas were observed held at 115-121 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment has not been approved for hot-holding. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

The cutting boards in the meat area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025

Door on the meat case was not in good repair, observed crack with missing piece at corner. Door on the chicken meat case was in poor repair, observed cracked glass. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Toilet was not operable, inspector observed toilet unable to flush at time of inspection. Per interview with PIC, pipes are frozen. Adequate, sanitary toilet facilities are necessary, at least 1 toilet and not fewer than the toilets required by LAW shall be provided. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
Live cat observed within establishment. PIC informed to remove live animal. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025
